calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Ramon M. Pinon, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Loven Paul Rondina, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Loven Paul R. Pinon.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Reset To Nov-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Petitioner: ramon Pinon, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Loven Paul Rondina, and with Tagalog Interpreter: Anna Hembrador.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Mother consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Nov. 15, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner file an Application with declaration for an Order dispensing with notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
